name: Using Free Dynamic DNS with afraid.org - LowEndBox
snippet:
The method I use is to setup free dynamic DNS via afraid.org. To do this, you need to register for a free account at afraid.org.
Once you've logged in, head over to Subdomains and setup a record using one of afraid.org's whimsical choices, such as chickenkiller.com, ...
